message:
feat(runtime): add task accessors to RuntimeState and migrate scheduler (bd-2018r)

Adds task-related accessor methods to RuntimeState:
- insert_task() / remove_task() for arena operations
- tasks_iter() for iteration
- tasks_is_empty() for emptiness check
- tasks_arena() / tasks_arena_mut() for direct arena access

Migrates all scheduler/local_queue.rs direct `state.tasks` accesses to
use the new accessor methods, completing the scheduler hot-path migration.

Part of bd-2018r (TaskTable Extraction).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
